reference: After prolonged surgery or prolonged positioning of the head in the same position, leading to ischemia and reduced blood flow to a point on the scalp due to constant pressure, this kind of thing can happen. It is referred to as a pressure sore and may even lead to permanent baldness in that region. Presently, only observation is required, and you can apply an oil-based ointment on it. It should reduce in size but may take a long time to heal fully.
